basics.name: Mantri Aditya
basics.label: Supply Chain Engineer
basics.summary: I am a Software Supply Chain Engineer at Cloud Data Networks with 2+ years of expertise in supply chain analytics. Previously, I worked at GreyOrange (Supply Planning).

skills.name: Supply Chain Software
keywords: MS Excel (Pivot tables, Solver, Boxs and whisker, Histograms)

work.summary: Analyzed supply chain data and supported logistics platform improvements using SQL, Python, and SAP WM.
highlights: Investigated supply chain anomalies using SQL and Python to extract inventory data from SAP WM.
Improved lead time adherence using deterministic and predictive models for demand forecasting.
Supported continuous improvement of distribution center processes within Manhattan WMS environment.

work.summary: Applied Six Sigma and Lean tools to drive process improvement across automated distribution workflows.
highlights: Applied Green Belt Six Sigma and Lean Manufacturing techniques to conduct RCA on automated system faults.
Developed Power BI dashboards using Run Charts and Pareto Charts to optimize fleet availability.
Forecasted customer demand to prevent stockouts and reduce lead times across distribution operations.

work.summary: Conducted process capability studies and flow mapping to support supply chain and inventory planning.
highlights: Spearheaded a Process Capability study using SPC charts to ensure reliable inputs for supply planning models.
Created detailed Flow Charts to map current vs. future state inspection processes and identify bottlenecks.

awards.title: Six Sigma Green Belt
awards.awarder: The Council for Six Sigma Certification
awards.summary: Demonstrated proficiency in DMAIC methodology, statistical process control, and Lean tools including RCA, Pareto Analysis, and Fishbone diagrams. Certified to lead process improvement initiatives that reduce operational waste and enhance supply chain efficiency.
